tasks.subject: Task 1: VERSION file + build pipeline + Entry.c remnant
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Plumb a top-level `VERSION` file through the EDK II build so every `.c` compiled by `GblChainloadPkg.dsc` sees `GBL_CHAINLOAD_VERSION`. Remove the .dsc `2.0` default and Entry.c `v2` fallback.

**Files:** VERSION (new), scripts/build.sh, scripts/build-inside-docker.sh, GblChainloadPkg/GblChainloadPkg.dsc, GblChainloadPkg/Application/GblChainload/Entry.c

**Verify:** echo 2.2.0 > VERSION && bash scripts/build.sh --mode 0 && strings dist/mode-0.efi | grep -cF 2.2.0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["VERSION", "scripts/build.sh", "scripts/build-inside-docker.sh", "GblChainloadPkg/GblChainloadPkg.dsc", "GblChainloadPkg/Application/GblChainload/Entry.c"], "verifyCommand": "echo 2.2.0 > VERSION && bash scripts/build.sh --mode 0 && strings dist/mode-0.efi | grep -cF 2.2.0", "acceptanceCriteria": ["VERSION file at repo root contains 2.2.0", "scripts/build.sh --mode 0 succeeds", "strings of dist/mode-0.efi contains 2.2.0 at least once", "GblChainloadPkg.dsc has no DEFINE GBL_CHAINLOAD_VERSION line", "Entry.c uses #error not v2 fallback"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Fastboot menu row + getvar (edk2 fork)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add VERSION row to fastboot menu and gbl-chainload_version getvar. Both linked into our chainloaded EFI from the edk2 fork.

**Files:** edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/BootLib/FastbootMenu.c, edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/FastbootLib/FastbootCmds.c

**Verify:** bash scripts/build.sh --mode 0 && strings dist/mode-0.efi | grep -E '^(VERSION - 2\.2\.0|gbl-chainload_version)$' | sort -u | wc -l → 2

```json:metadata
{"files": ["edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/BootLib/FastbootMenu.c", "edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/FastbootLib/FastbootCmds.c"], "verifyCommand": "bash scripts/build.sh --mode 0 && [[ $(strings dist/mode-0.efi | grep -E '^(VERSION - 2\\.2\\.0|gbl-chainload_version)$' | sort -u | wc -l) -eq 2 ]]", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FastbootMenu.c declares new VERSION row after MODE row", "FastbootCmds.c publishes gbl-chainload_version getvar", "rebuilt mode-0.efi contains both literals"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Host tools — --version + Makefile wiring + gbl-pack remnant
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. MUST NOT be closed by walking around it. Close only after every acceptance criterion has been re-validated independently with output captured.

**Goal:** Each of seven host tools accepts --version, prints VERSION, exits 0. gbl-pack 1.0.0 hardcode removed. No project-version remnant survives outside protocol/schema/Android-domain.

**Files:** Makefile + .c for each of fv-unwrap, abl-patcher, gbl-pack, gbl-commit, vbmeta-graft, mode2-profile, gblp1-inspect

**Verify:** bash scripts/build-recovery-tools.sh; for each tool, ./dist/recovery/$t --version | grep -qF $(cat VERSION); remnant grep returns zero.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/fv-unwrap/Makefile", "tools/fv-unwrap/fv-unwrap.c", "tools/abl-patcher/Makefile", "tools/abl-patcher/abl-patcher.c", "tools/gbl-pack/Makefile", "tools/gbl-pack/gbl-pack.c", "tools/gbl-commit/Makefile", "tools/gbl-commit/gbl-commit.c", "tools/vbmeta-graft/Makefile", "tools/vbmeta-graft/vbmeta-graft.c", "tools/mode2-profile/Makefile", "tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.c", "tools/gblp1-inspect/Makefile", "tools/gblp1-inspect/gblp1-inspect.c"], "verifyCommand": "bash scripts/build-recovery-tools.sh && for t in fv-unwrap abl-patcher gbl-pack gbl-commit vbmeta-graft mode2-profile gblp1-inspect; do out=$(./dist/recovery/$t --version 2>&1 || true); printf '%s' \"$out\" | grep -qF \"$(cat VERSION)\" || exit 1; done && ! grep -rn -E '\"gbl-pack 1\\.0\\.0\"|\"v2\"' --include='*.c' --include='*.h' --exclude-dir=edk2 --exclude-dir=Build .", "acceptanceCriteria": ["every tool Makefile sources GBL_TOOL_VERSION from VERSION", "every tool main() handles --version printing VERSION and exiting 0", "gbl-pack.c packer_version uses macro, no literal 1.0.0", "remnant grep returns zero non-edk2/non-Build matches", "all seven binaries print VERSION at --version"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: build-cross-tools.sh — add Linux x86_64 target
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend zig-based cross-build with linux target; static x86_64. `all` becomes win+macos+linux.

**Files:** scripts/build-cross-tools.sh + each tool Makefile (add `linux:` target)

**Verify:** bash scripts/build-cross-tools.sh linux && file dist/linux/fv-unwrap | grep 'ELF 64-bit.*x86_64.*statically' && ./dist/linux/fv-unwrap --version | grep -qF $(cat VERSION)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/build-cross-tools.sh", "tools/fv-unwrap/Makefile", "tools/abl-patcher/Makefile", "tools/gbl-pack/Makefile", "tools/gbl-commit/Makefile", "tools/vbmeta-graft/Makefile", "tools/mode2-profile/Makefile", "tools/gblp1-inspect/Makefile"], "verifyCommand": "bash scripts/build-cross-tools.sh linux && file dist/linux/fv-unwrap | grep -q 'ELF 64-bit.*x86_64.*statically linked' && ./dist/linux/fv-unwrap --version | grep -qF \"$(cat VERSION)\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dist/linux populated with 7 binaries plus SHA256SUMS", "binaries are static x86_64 ELF", "all target builds win+macos+linux", "fv-unwrap --version prints VERSION on ubuntu-latest"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: efisp-package.py — --bin-dir, --version, script-dir fallback
tasks.description:
**Goal:** efisp-package.py self-contained inside unzipped bundle. Adjacent bin/ + VERSION found via script_dir.

**Files:** scripts/efisp-package.py

**Verify:** python3 scripts/efisp-package.py --version | grep -qF $(cat VERSION); tmp-dir test also works.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/efisp-package.py"], "verifyCommand": "python3 scripts/efisp-package.py --version | grep -qF \"$(cat VERSION)\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--version prints VERSION file contents", "--bin-dir overrides tool resolution", "script-adjacent bin/ wins over PATH when --bin-dir absent", "PATH fallback when no adjacent bin/"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: build-recovery-zip.sh + update-binary — VERSION substitution
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Installer ZIPs greet user with `gbl-chainload v<VER>` via ui_print. build-recovery-zip.sh substitutes __GBL_VERSION__ placeholder in staged update-binary.

**Files:** scripts/build-recovery-zip.sh, zip/META-INF/com/google/android/update-binary (zip submodule).

**Verify:** All 5 modes' ZIPs contain `gbl-chainload v<VER>` and no `__GBL_VERSION__`.

Note: zip submodule main push needs user authorization.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/build-recovery-zip.sh", "zip/META-INF/com/google/android/update-binary"], "verifyCommand": "for m in diag graft mode-0-install mode-1-install mode-2-install; do bash scripts/build-recovery-zip.sh --mode \"$m\"; unzip -p dist/gbl-chainload-${m}.zip META-INF/com/google/android/update-binary | grep -qF \"gbl-chainload v$(cat VERSION)\" || exit 1; ! unzip -p dist/gbl-chainload-${m}.zip META-INF/com/google/android/update-binary | grep -q '__GBL_VERSION__' || exit 1; done", "acceptanceCriteria": ["update-binary contains __GBL_VERSION__ placeholder once", "build-recovery-zip.sh substitutes placeholder in staged file", "all five ZIPs carry gbl-chainload v<VERSION> ui_print line", "no ZIP leaks the unsubstituted placeholder"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Static release-time files — RELEASE_README + .github/release.yml + CHANGELOG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three hand-curated text files the release workflow consumes.

**Files:** tools/RELEASE_README.md (new), .github/release.yml (new), CHANGELOG.md (new).

**Verify:** RELEASE_README ≥30 lines; release.yml valid YAML; CHANGELOG has ^## v2.2.0 section.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/RELEASE_README.md", ".github/release.yml", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "test -f tools/RELEASE_README.md && [[ $(wc -l < tools/RELEASE_README.md) -ge 30 ]] && python3 -c 'import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open(\".github/release.yml\"))' && grep -E '^## v2\\.2\\.0' CHANGELOG.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RELEASE_README has per-tool table and verify command", "release.yml valid YAML with four categories", "CHANGELOG has v2.2.0 section"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: .github/workflows/release.yml — the workflow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Complete release workflow per spec §3 — 5 jobs (verify, prep-image, build-host-tools, build-zips, release). Triggers on tag v* and workflow_dispatch.

**Files:** .github/workflows/release.yml

**Verify:** YAML parses; job set exactly matches the five; actionlint clean if installed.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/release.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c 'import yaml; wf = yaml.safe_load(open(\".github/workflows/release.yml\")); assert set(wf[\"jobs\"]) == {\"verify\", \"prep-image\", \"build-host-tools\", \"build-zips\", \"release\"}, wf[\"jobs\"]'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["YAML parses", "actionlint clean if installed", "five jobs with correct needs graph", "verify enforces 5 gates", "prep-image uses gha docker cache", "build-host-tools produces 3 platform zips with full payload", "build-zips produces 5 versioned installer zips", "release posts single draft with SHA256SUMS + notes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: End-to-end dispatch smoke test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Trigger release.yml via workflow_dispatch version=2.2.0, watch all jobs green, verify draft release has 9 assets, round-trip sha256sum -c locally.

**Files:** none

**Verify:** gh workflow run → gh run watch --exit-status → gh release view assets count == 9 → download + sha256sum -c OK.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "gh workflow run release.yml -f version=2.2.0 && sleep 10 && run_id=$(gh run list --workflow=release.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId') && gh run watch \"$run_id\" --exit-status && [[ $(gh release view v2.2.0 --json assets --jq '.assets | length') -eq 9 ]]", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dispatch run completes success on every job", "draft release v2.2.0 exists", "exactly 9 assets attached", "sha256sum -c verifies all 8 zips", "notes contain CHANGELOG prologue and auto What's Changed list"]}
```
